chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5035 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on Misc. No.22416/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 16.10.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This petition was last taken up on 14.10.2024. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
